docs.title: omni-twilio
docs.text: Go SDK for Twilio with adapters for OmniChat (SMS) and OmniVoice (voice).

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Client: Exported Twilio REST API client for calls and SMS
  • Transport: Twilio Media Streams for real-time audio
  • TTS: Text-to-speech via Twilio's Say verb (Alice, Polly, Google voices)
  • STT: Speech recognition via Gather verb and real-time transcription
  • SMS: Send/receive SMS via OmniChat provider interface

docs.title: Package Structure
docs.text:
omni-twilio/
├── client/           # Exported Twilio REST API client
├── omnichat/         # SMS provider for omnichat
└── omnivoice/
    ├── callsystem/   # Call handling provider
    ├── transport/    # Media Streams provider
    ├── stt/          # Speech-to-text provider
    └── tts/          # Text-to-speech provider

docs.title: SMS (OmniChat)
docs.text:
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnichat"

provider, _ := omnichat.New(
    omnichat.WithAccountSID("ACxxxxxxxx"),
    omnichat.WithAuthToken("your-token"),
    omnichat.WithPhoneNumber("+15551234567"),
)

// Connect and send SMS
provider.Connect(ctx)
provider.Send(ctx, "+15559876543", provider.OutgoingMessage{
    Content: "Hello from Twilio!",
})

// Handle incoming SMS via webhook
http.Handle("/sms", provider.WebhookHandler())

docs.title: Voice (OmniVoice)
docs.text:
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/callsystem"

provider, _ := callsystem.New(
    callsystem.WithAccountSID("ACxxxxxxxx"),
    callsystem.WithAuthToken("your-token"),
    callsystem.WithPhoneNumber("+15551234567"),
)

// Make an outbound call
call, _ := provider.MakeCall(ctx, "+15559876543", callbackURL)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
• GitHub Repository
  • Go Package Documentation
  • Changelog

docs.title: Go Module
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio

docs.title: Twilio Credentials
docs.text:
You'll need:

  1. Account SID - Found on your Twilio Console dashboard
  2. Auth Token - Found on your Twilio Console dashboard
  3. Phone Number - A Twilio phone number for sending SMS/making calls

docs.title: Environment Variables
docs.text:
export TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID="ACxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
export TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN="your-auth-token"
export TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER="+15551234567"

docs.title: Package Imports
docs.text:
Import the packages you need:

SMS (OmniChat)Voice (OmniVoice)Direct Client 
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnichat"

import (
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/callsystem"
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/transport"
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/tts"
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/stt"
)

import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/client"

docs.title: Verification
docs.text:
Verify your installation:

package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "os"

    "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/client"
)

func main() {
    c, err := client.New(&client.Config{
        AccountSID: os.Getenv("TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID"),
        AuthToken:  os.Getenv("TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN"),
    })
    if err != nil {
        panic(err)
    }

    numbers, err := c.ListPhoneNumbers(context.Background())
    if err != nil {
        panic(err)
    }

    fmt.Printf("Found %d phone numbers\n", len(numbers))
}

docs.title: Version Compatibility
docs.text: omni-twilio omnichat omnivoice-core Go v0.4.x v0.5+ v0.7+ 1.21+ v0.3.x - v0.6+ 1.21+ v0.2.x - v0.5+ 1.21+

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
twilio-go is a Go SDK for Twilio that provides:

  1. Twilio Client - Low-level REST API client for Twilio services
  2. OmniChat Provider - SMS messaging via the omnichat provider.Provider interface
  3. OmniVoice Providers - Voice call handling via omnivoice-core interfaces

docs.title: SMS Messaging (OmniChat)
docs.text:
Use the omnichat package when you need:

  • Send/receive SMS messages
  • Webhook handling for inbound messages
  • Integration with the omnichat multi-provider messaging framework

docs.title: Voice Calls (OmniVoice)
docs.text:
Use the omnivoice packages when you need:

  • Outbound voice calls
  • Real-time audio streaming via Media Streams
  • Speech-to-text and text-to-speech
  • Integration with the omnivoice voice agent framework

docs.title: Direct API Access
docs.text:
Use the client package when you need:

  • Direct access to Twilio REST API
  • Custom integrations not covered by the provider interfaces
  • Building your own abstractions

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• Go 1.21 or later
  • Twilio Account SID and Auth Token
  • Phone number(s) provisioned in your Twilio account

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.1.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2025-12-28

docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Initial release of omnivoice-twilio, providing Twilio integration for the OmniVoice voice pipeline framework.

docs.title: Twilio Client
docs.text:
• MakeCall - Initiate outbound calls
  • GetCall - Retrieve call details
  • UpdateCall - Modify active calls
  • HangupCall - Terminate calls
  • ListPhoneNumbers - List available phone numbers

docs.title: WebSocket Transport
docs.text:
• Twilio Media Streams WebSocket transport for real-time audio streaming
  • Bidirectional audio support for voice agents

docs.title: OmniVoice Integration
docs.text:
• Call system provider implementing callsystem.Provider interface
  • Transport provider implementing transport.Provider interface
  • Seamless integration with OmniVoice STT/TTS pipelines

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice-twilio@v0.1.0

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.2.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-02-28

docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Organization rename from agentplexus to plexusone with updated module path.

docs.title: Breaking Changes
docs.text: Component Before After Go module github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice-twilio github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio

docs.title: Migration Guide
docs.text:
Update your import paths:

// Before
import "github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice-twilio/callsystem"
import "github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice-twilio/transport"

// After
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio/callsystem"
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio/transport"

Update your go.mod:

go mod edit -droprequire github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice-twilio
go get github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio@v0.2.0
go mod tidy

docs.title: Tests
docs.text: • Added conformance tests for CallSystem, STT, TTS, and Transport providers

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • Updated to github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-core v0.5.0 (was github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice)

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.3.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-03-22

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: SMS messaging support via the callsystem.SMSProvider interface.

docs.title: SMS Support
docs.text:
The Twilio Provider now implements callsystem.SMSProvider from omnivoice-core, enabling SMS messaging alongside voice calls.

import "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio/callsystem"

// Create provider with default phone number
provider, _ := callsystem.New(
    callsystem.WithPhoneNumber("+15551234567"),
)

// Send SMS using default number
msg, _ := provider.SendSMS(ctx, "+15559876543", "Hello from OmniVoice!")

// Send SMS from specific number
msg, _ = provider.SendSMSFrom(ctx, "+15559876543", "+15551234567", "Hello!")

docs.title: New Methods
docs.text:
• SendSMS(ctx, to, body) - Send SMS using the provider's default phone number
  • SendSMSFrom(ctx, to, from, body) - Send SMS from a specific phone number

docs.title: Interface Compliance
docs.text:
The Provider now satisfies both interfaces:

var (
    _ callsystem.CallSystem  = (*Provider)(nil)
    _ callsystem.SMSProvider = (*Provider)(nil)
)

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • Updated github.com/twilio/twilio-go from 1.30.2 to 1.30.3

docs.title: Upgrade Guide
docs.text:
This release is backward compatible. No changes required for existing code.

To use the new SMS functionality:

  1. Update your dependency: 

    go get github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio@v0.3.0

  2. Use SendSMS or SendSMSFrom methods on your existing Provider instance.

docs.title: Full Changelog
docs.text: See CHANGELOG.md for the complete list of changes.

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.4.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-04-18

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Breaking: Rename from omnivoice-twilio to twilio-go
  • Add OmniChat SMS provider for omnichat integration

docs.title: Module Rename
docs.text: The module has been renamed from github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio to github.com/plexusone/twilio-go to better reflect its expanded scope beyond voice-only functionality.

docs.title: New Package Structure
docs.text:
twilio-go/
├── client/           # Exported Twilio REST API client (was internal)
├── omnichat/         # NEW: SMS provider for omnichat
└── omnivoice/
    ├── callsystem/   # Call handling provider
    ├── transport/    # Media Streams provider
    ├── stt/          # Speech-to-text provider
    └── tts/          # Text-to-speech provider

docs.title: OmniChat SMS Provider
docs.text:
New omnichat package implementing provider.Provider from omnichat:

import "github.com/plexusone/twilio-go/omnichat"

provider, _ := omnichat.New(
    omnichat.WithAccountSID("ACxxxxxxxx"),
    omnichat.WithAuthToken("your-token"),
    omnichat.WithPhoneNumber("+15551234567"),
)

// Connect and send SMS
provider.Connect(ctx)
provider.Send(ctx, "+15559876543", provider.OutgoingMessage{
    Content: "Hello from Twilio!",
})

// Handle incoming SMS via webhook
http.Handle("/sms", provider.WebhookHandler())

docs.title: Exported Twilio Client
docs.text:
The Twilio REST API client is now exported at client/ (previously internal/client):

import "github.com/plexusone/twilio-go/client"

c, _ := client.New(&client.Config{
    AccountSID: "ACxxxxxxxx",
    AuthToken:  "your-token",
})

// Send SMS directly
msg, _ := c.SendSMS(ctx, &client.SendSMSParams{
    To:   "+15559876543",
    From: "+15551234567",
    Body: "Hello!",
})

docs.title: Module Path
docs.text:
- import "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio/callsystem"
+ import "github.com/plexusone/twilio-go/omnivoice/callsystem"

docs.title: Package Locations
docs.text:
Old Path New Path omnivoice-twilio/callsystem twilio-go/omnivoice/callsystem omnivoice-twilio/transport twilio-go/omnivoice/transport omnivoice-twilio/stt twilio-go/omnivoice/stt omnivoice-twilio/tts twilio-go/omnivoice/tts

Note: The Twilio client is now exported at twilio-go/client (previously internal and inaccessible).

docs.title: Step 1: Update Import Paths
docs.text:
Replace all imports:

# Using sed
find . -name "*.go" -exec sed -i '' \
  's|github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-twilio|github.com/plexusone/twilio-go/omnivoice|g' {} +

# Or manually update imports

docs.title: Step 2: Update go.mod
docs.text:
go get github.com/plexusone/twilio-go@v0.4.0
go mod tidy

docs.title: Step 3: Verify Build
docs.text:
go build ./...
go test ./...

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • Bump github.com/twilio/twilio-go from 1.30.4 to 1.30.5

docs.title: Security Fixes
docs.text: • Resolve G120 gosec lint errors by adding http.MaxBytesReader to webhook handlers

docs.title: Full Changelog
docs.text: See CHANGELOG.md for the complete list of changes.

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.5.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-05-03

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: • Breaking: Rename module from twilio-go to omni-twilio

docs.title: Module Rename
docs.text: The module has been renamed from github.com/plexusone/twilio-go to github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio to align with the omni-* naming convention used by other PlexusOne adapter packages (omni-openai, omni-deepgram).

docs.title: Module Path
docs.text:

+ import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnichat"

- import "github.com/plexusone/twilio-go/omnivoice/callsystem"
+ import "github.com/plexusone/omni-twilio/omnivoice/callsystem"

docs.title: Package Locations
docs.text: Old Path New Path twilio-go/client omni-twilio/client twilio-go/omnichat omni-twilio/omnichat twilio-go/omnivoice/callsystem omni-twilio/omnivoice/callsystem twilio-go/omnivoice/transport omni-twilio/omnivoice/transport twilio-go/omnivoice/tts omni-twilio/omnivoice/tts twilio-go/omnivoice/stt omni-twilio/omnivoice/stt

docs.title: Step 1: Update Import Paths
